page_content:
CHIN204 Intermediate Written Chinese II (3 Credits)

Continuation of CHIN202.

Prerequisite: CHIN202; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department; or must have attained appropriate World Language Placement (WLP) score.

Corequisite: CHIN203.

Additional Information: Must be taken in conjunction with CHIN203.

CHIN205 Intermediate Chinese - Accelerated Track (3 Credits) Accelerated instruction in Mandarin Chinese at the intermediate level for students with prior Chinese language background, either through home use or formal instruction.
